name: python3-mcp
title: python3-mcp
summary: implementation of the Model Context Protocol (Python 3)
description:
implementation of the Model Context Protocol (Python 3)
This package contains a full mcp specification, making it easy to:
* build mcp clients that can connect to any mcp server
* create mcp servers that expose resources, prompts and tools
* use standard transports like stdio, sse, and streamable http
* handle all mcp protocol messages and lifecycle events
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for python-mcp.
arguments.raw: -mcp  Option present in package usage line for python-mcp.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python-mcp because implementation of the Model Context Protocol (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python-mcp as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `python-mcp [options] [args]` as documented upstream for python-mcp.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python-mcp with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python-mcp --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
